ideation: This sequence shows a llama gently swaying its head and neck.  The animation will focus on subtle arm movements to mirror this motion. The left arm will mimic the llama's head, while the right arm remains more static for balance.  The arms will move with a gentle, flowing motion, creating a sense of calm and tranquility.  I will reference other examples to ensure the arm movements are smooth and natural. In the first frame, both arms will start in a neutral position at the side, slightly angled forward. In the second frame, the left arm will move slightly outward and upward, mimicking a gentle swaying motion. In the third frame, the left arm will return to its neutral position. Finally, in the fourth frame, the left arm will move outward and downward in a gentle swaying motion, contrasting with the upward movement in frame 2. The right arm will remain relatively still throughout the sequence to provide a sense of balance.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, a gentle sway begins
left arm lifts slightly, mimicking a curious tilt
the head returns to center, arms steady
left arm dips gently, a soft, flowing movement
